## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Webstacks and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, metrics, and optimization opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/6bbQ7QbsP4QEM3yo3LyxUkyv4ykzdvJw?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Metrics show positive trends in content performance, with rising impressions and clicks](https://fathom.video/share/6bbQ7QbsP4QEM3yo3LyxUkyv4ykzdvJw?tab=summary&timestamp=128.0)
  - [Team is exploring ways to enrich content workflows, including custom APIs and vision-based analysis](https://fathom.video/share/6bbQ7QbsP4QEM3yo3LyxUkyv4ykzdvJw?tab=summary&timestamp=465.0)
  - [Focus on building targeted audiences based on content engagement for more effective marketing](https://fathom.video/share/6bbQ7QbsP4QEM3yo3LyxUkyv4ykzdvJw?tab=summary&timestamp=587.0)
  - [Opportunity to improve content relevance and incorporate Webstacks' unique perspective/expertise](https://fathom.video/share/6bbQ7QbsP4QEM3yo3LyxUkyv4ykzdvJw?tab=summary&timestamp=1252.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Metrics

  - [Positive trends observed in impressions and clicks for published content](https://fathom.video/share/6bbQ7QbsP4QEM3yo3LyxUkyv4ykzdvJw?tab=summary&timestamp=128.0)
  - [New Airtable dashboard created to track page performance metrics (clicks, impressions, CTR)](https://fathom.video/share/6bbQ7QbsP4QEM3yo3LyxUkyv4ykzdvJw?tab=summary&timestamp=154.0)
  - [Team encourages patience until weeks 4-5 to see more substantial metrics](https://fathom.video/share/6bbQ7QbsP4QEM3yo3LyxUkyv4ykzdvJw?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)

### Audience Building and Lead Scoring

  - [Implementing ICP (Ideal Customer Profile) filtering to assess quality of traffic](https://fathom.video/share/6bbQ7QbsP4QEM3yo3LyxUkyv4ykzdvJw?tab=summary&timestamp=580.0)
  - [Clay Table setup proposed to enrich visitor data with LinkedIn profiles and job titles](https://fathom.video/share/6bbQ7QbsP4QEM3yo3LyxUkyv4ykzdvJw?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Goal: Filter high-quality leads based on job title, visited pages, and company fit](https://fathom.video/share/6bbQ7QbsP4QEM3yo3LyxUkyv4ykzdvJw?tab=summary&timestamp=628.0)
  - [Potential to automate outbound sequences based on visitor intent and content engagement](https://fathom.video/share/6bbQ7QbsP4QEM3yo3LyxUkyv4ykzdvJw?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)

### Content Enrichment Strategies

  - [Exploring custom workflows for content enrichment, e.g., mentioning relevant subreddits](https://fathom.video/share/6bbQ7QbsP4QEM3yo3LyxUkyv4ykzdvJw?tab=summary&timestamp=1465.0)
  - [Considering advanced research agents to compile company information and synthesize insights](https://fathom.video/share/6bbQ7QbsP4QEM3yo3LyxUkyv4ykzdvJw?tab=summary&timestamp=1465.0)
  - [Potential project: Creating a design critique catalog of SaaS websites for lead generation and content examples](https://fathom.video/share/6bbQ7QbsP4QEM3yo3LyxUkyv4ykzdvJw?tab=summary&timestamp=1822.0)

### Retargeting and Audience Segmentation

  - [Current retargeting is broad; opportunity to create more specific audience segments](https://fathom.video/share/6bbQ7QbsP4QEM3yo3LyxUkyv4ykzdvJw?tab=summary&timestamp=1237.0)
  - [Need to capitalize on timing and engagement to nurture leads effectively](https://fathom.video/share/6bbQ7QbsP4QEM3yo3LyxUkyv4ykzdvJw?tab=summary&timestamp=1721.0)
  - [Exploring ways to continuously stay top-of-mind for prospects and identify high-intent signals](https://fathom.video/share/6bbQ7QbsP4QEM3yo3LyxUkyv4ykzdvJw?tab=summary&timestamp=1753.0)

### Content Topics and Perspective

  - [Team to be mindful of keeping topics relevant to B2B audience and avoid overly broad SEO topics](https://fathom.video/share/6bbQ7QbsP4QEM3yo3LyxUkyv4ykzdvJw?tab=summary&timestamp=2160.0)
  - [Webstacks to provide context (e.g., Gong recordings, discovery calls) to infuse their unique perspective into content](https://fathom.video/share/6bbQ7QbsP4QEM3yo3LyxUkyv4ykzdvJw?tab=summary&timestamp=2252.0)
  - [Proposal to review topic batches in advance to allow time for Webstacks input and resources](https://fathom.video/share/6bbQ7QbsP4QEM3yo3LyxUkyv4ykzdvJw?tab=summary&timestamp=2407.0)

### Content Updates

  - [5 articles on cost management to be published imminently](https://fathom.video/share/6bbQ7QbsP4QEM3yo3LyxUkyv4ykzdvJw?tab=summary&timestamp=2039.0)
  - [4-5 more articles in the pipeline for content refreshing](https://fathom.video/share/6bbQ7QbsP4QEM3yo3LyxUkyv4ykzdvJw?tab=summary&timestamp=2040.0)
  - [Total of 58 articles published to date](https://fathom.video/share/6bbQ7QbsP4QEM3yo3LyxUkyv4ykzdvJw?tab=summary&timestamp=2100.0)
  - [Team working on refreshing content that has lost ranking positions](https://fathom.video/share/6bbQ7QbsP4QEM3yo3LyxUkyv4ykzdvJw?tab=summary&timestamp=2050.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jesse to share Clay credentials for audience building setup](https://fathom.video/share/6bbQ7QbsP4QEM3yo3LyxUkyv4ykzdvJw?tab=summary&timestamp=776.0)
  - [Marcel and Jimmy to work on developing more custom workflows](https://fathom.video/share/6bbQ7QbsP4QEM3yo3LyxUkyv4ykzdvJw?tab=summary&timestamp=1892.0)
  - [Devon to add Sanity, Storyblok, and potentially Adobe Experience Manager to content topics](https://fathom.video/share/6bbQ7QbsP4QEM3yo3LyxUkyv4ykzdvJw?tab=summary&timestamp=1930.0)
  - [Andrej to prioritize content refreshes for articles that have lost ranking positions](https://fathom.video/share/6bbQ7QbsP4QEM3yo3LyxUkyv4ykzdvJw?tab=summary&timestamp=2050.0)
  - [Jesse to provide Gong recordings and discovery call examples for content enrichment](https://fathom.video/share/6bbQ7QbsP4QEM3yo3LyxUkyv4ykzdvJw?tab=summary&timestamp=2252.0)
  - [Team to explore incorporating Webstacks' unique perspective into future content](https://fathom.video/share/6bbQ7QbsP4QEM3yo3LyxUkyv4ykzdvJw?tab=summary&timestamp=2520.0)
  - [Andrej to present topic batches in advance for Webstacks' review and input](https://fathom.video/share/6bbQ7QbsP4QEM3yo3LyxUkyv4ykzdvJw?tab=summary&timestamp=2407.0)
